title: Decadent Spicy British Linguine Pasta Skillet
description: A spicy and savory British-inspired linguine pasta dish cooked in a cast-iron skillet, featuring a blend of tamasic-friendly ingredients and a molten, cheesy sauce.

ingredients.name: linguine pasta
ingredients.notes: preferably made from durum wheat semolina

instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the linguine pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
Heat the olive oil in a cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne pepper, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the cooked linguine pasta to the skillet, tossing to combine with the spice mixture.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Season the pasta with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the Decadent Spicy British Linguine Pasta Skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
